overview: A video streaming website with a protected admin panel for scraping and managing videos from external API sources. The public frontend allows anyone to browse and watch videos by category, while the admin backend at /momoazz lets the owner configure API sources, trigger scraping, and edit or delete videos.
features: Public video browsing by category with pagination
Video detail page with embedded player and multiple play sources
Internet Identity protected admin panel at /momoazz
Admin scraper: configure API URL, trigger full collection, view progress
Admin video management: edit video details and delete videos
Automatic play URL normalization and source extraction
